'''R2-AG4''' was an [[R2-AG agromech droid]] produced by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]].

After Industrial Automaton cancelled production of its [[R5-series astromech droid]], R5 unit shells were used in the manufacture of the R2-AG-series. Thus, R2-AG4 appeared similar to an R5-series droid, notable for its flat head.
